title: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
description: Score attack or co-op race — most rings/score after completing Emerald Hill Zone wins. Also supports 2-player split-screen race mode (Sonic vs Tails).

p1_lives.notes: AR: FFFE12:0009. Lives. Same address as Sonic 1. Poll at 0xFE12.

rings.notes: AR: FFFE20:00C8. Ring count (16-bit BE). Poll at 0xFE20.

score.notes: Score (32-bit BE). Same layout as Sonic 1 — confirmed TCRF location.

stage_act.notes: AR: FFFE10:XXYY — XX=stage (0-7), YY=act (0-1). Stage/act indicator. Poll at 0xFE10.

timer.notes: AR: FFFE24:0007. Act timer. Poll at 0xFE24.

tournament_rules: Score attack — Emerald Hill Zone (2 acts). Highest score wins. Simultaneous start on same save state. Rings held at act end contribute to score bonus. 2-player split-screen race also viable: Sonic vs Tails, first to finish Zone 1 wins.
sources: libretro-database/cht MD AR: FFFE12 lives, FFFE20 rings, FFFE10 stage/act, FFFE24 timer
TCRF Sonic 2 MD RAM map (same layout as Sonic 1)
name: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
